hooks.command: bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff check "$1" 2>&1 | head -20 || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run pyright "$1" 2>&1 | tail -5 || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py && "$1" != *test* ]] && grep -n "print(" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: print() found -- use logging instead" || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff format --check "$1" 2>&1 | head -10 || true' _ "$filePath"

bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py && "$1" != *test* ]] && grep -nE "(eval\(|exec\(|pickle\.|subprocess\.call|os\.system\(|__import__)" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: potentially unsafe operation found" || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff check "$1" 2>&1 | head -20 || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run pyright "$1" 2>&1 | tail -5 || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py && "$1" != *test* ]] && grep -n "print(" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: print() found -- use logging instead" || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff format --check "$1" 2>&1 | head -10 || true' _ "$filePath"

bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py && "$1" != *test* ]] && grep -nE "(eval\(|exec\(|pickle\.|subprocess\.call|os\.system\(|__import__)" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: potentially unsafe operation found" || true' _ "$filePath"
